006 * (the "License"); you may not use this file except in compliance with
007 * the License.  You may obtain a copy of the License at
008 *
009 *      http://www.apache.org/licenses/LICENSE-2.0
010 *

012 * distributed under the License is distributed on an "AS IS" BASIS,
013 * WITHOUT WARRANTIES OR CONDITIONS OF ANY KIND, either express or implied.
014 * See the License for the specific language governing permissions and
015 * limitations under the License.
016 */
017package org.apache.juneau.marshall.cp;
018
019import static org.apache.juneau.commons.utils.CollectionUtils.*;
020import static org.apache.juneau.commons.utils.ResourceBundleUtils.*;
021import static org.apache.juneau.commons.utils.StringUtils.*;
022import static org.apache.juneau.commons.utils.StringUtils.isEmpty;
023import static org.apache.juneau.commons.utils.ThrowableUtils.*;
024import static org.apache.juneau.commons.utils.Utils.*;
025
026import java.text.*;
027import java.util.*;
028import java.util.concurrent.*;
029
030import org.apache.juneau.commons.collections.*;
031import org.apache.juneau.commons.function.*;
032import org.apache.juneau.commons.utils.*;
033import org.apache.juneau.marshall.collections.*;
034import org.apache.juneau.marshall.marshaller.*;
035import org.apache.juneau.marshall.parser.ParseException;
036
037/**
038 * An enhanced {@link ResourceBundle}.
039 *
040 * <p>
041 * Wraps a ResourceBundle to provide some useful additional functionality.
042 *
043 * <ul>
044 *    <li>
045 *       Instead of throwing {@link MissingResourceException}, the {@link ResourceBundle#getString(String)} method
046 *       will return <js>"{!key}"</js> if the message could not be found.
047 *    <li>
048 *       Supported hierarchical lookup of resources from parent parent classes.
049 *    <li>
050 *       Support for easy retrieval of localized bundles.
051 *    <li>
052 *       Support for generalized resource bundles (e.g. properties files containing keys for several classes).
053 * </ul>
054 *
055 * <p>
056 * The following example shows the basic usage of this class for retrieving localized messages:
057 *
058 * <p class='bini'>
059 *    <cc># Contents of MyClass.properties</cc>
060 *    <ck>foo</ck> = <cv>foo {0}</cv>
061 *    <ck>MyClass.bar</ck> = <cv>bar {0}</cv>
062 * </p>
063 * <p class='bjava'>
064 *    <jk>public class</jk> MyClass {
065 *       <jk>private static final</jk> Messages <jsf>MESSAGES</jsf> = Messages.<jsm>of</jsm>(MyClass.<jk>class</jk>);
066 *
067 *       <jk>public void</jk> doFoo() {
068 *
069 *       <jc>// A normal property.</jc>
070 *          String <jv>foo</jv> = <jsf>MESSAGES</jsf>.getString(<js>"foo"</js>,<js>"x"</js>);  <jc>// == "foo x"</jc>
071 *
072 *          <jc>// A property prefixed by class name.</jc>
073 *          String <jv>bar</jv> = <jsf>MESSAGES</jsf>.getString(<js>"bar"</js>,<js>"x"</js>);  <jc>// == "bar x"</jc>
074 *
075 *          <jc>// A non-existent property.</jc>
076 *          String <jv>baz</jv> = <jsf>MESSAGES</jsf>.getString(<js>"baz"</js>,<js>"x"</js>);  <jc>// == "{!baz}"</jc>
077 *       }
078 *    }
079 * </p>
080 *
081 * <p>
082 *    The ability to resolve keys prefixed by class name allows you to place all your messages in a single file such
083 *    as a common <js>"Messages.properties"</js> file along with those for other classes.
084 * <p>
085 *    The following shows how to retrieve messages from a common bundle:
086 *
087 * <p class='bjava'>
088 *    <jk>public class</jk> MyClass {
089 *       <jk>private static final</jk> Messages <jsf>MESSAGES</jsf> = Messages.<jsm>of</jsm>(MyClass.<jk>class</jk>, <js>"Messages"</js>);
090 *    }
091 * </p>
092 *
093 * <p>
094 *    Resource bundles are searched using the following base name patterns:
095 *    <ul>
096 *       <li><js>"{package}.{name}"</js>
097 *       <li><js>"{package}.i18n.{name}"</js>
098 *       <li><js>"{package}.nls.{name}"</js>
099 *       <li><js>"{package}.messages.{name}"</js>
100 *    </ul>
101 *
102 * <p>
103 *    These patterns can be customized using the {@link Builder#baseNames(String...)} method.
104 *
105 * <p>
106 *    Localized messages can be retrieved in the following way:
107 *
108 * <p class='bjava'>
109 *    <jc>// Return value from Japan locale bundle.</jc>
110 *    String <jv>foo</jv> = <jsf>MESSAGES</jsf>.forLocale(Locale.<jsf>JAPAN</jsf>).getString(<js>"foo"</js>);
111 * </p>
112 *
113 */
114public class Messages extends ResourceBundle {
115
116   /**
117    * Builder class.
118    */
119   public static class Builder {
120
121      private static class MessagesString {
122         private String name;
123         private String[] baseNames;
124         private String locale;
125      }
126
127      Class<?> forClass;
128      Locale locale;
129      String name;
130      Messages parent;
131
132      List<Tuple2<Class<?>,String>> locations;
133
134      private String[] baseNames = { "{package}.{name}", "{package}.i18n.{name}", "{package}.nls.{name}", "{package}.messages.{name}" };
135
136      /**
137       * Constructor.
138       *
139       * @param forClass The base class.
140       */
141      protected Builder(Class<?> forClass) {
142         this.forClass = forClass;
143         this.name = cns(forClass);
144         locations = list();
145         locale = Locale.getDefault();
146      }
147
148      /**
149       * Specifies the base name patterns to use for finding the resource bundle.
150       *
151       * @param baseNames
152       *    The bundle base names.
153       *    <br>The default is the following:
154       *    <ul>
155       *       <li><js>"{package}.{name}"</js>
156       *       <li><js>"{package}.i18n.{name}"</js>
157       *       <li><js>"{package}.nls.{name}"</js>
158       *       <li><js>"{package}.messages.{name}"</js>
159       *    </ul>
160       * @return This object.
161       */
162      public Builder baseNames(String...baseNames) {
163         this.baseNames = baseNames == null ? a() : baseNames;
164         return this;
165      }
166
167
168      /**
169       * Specifies the locale.
170       *
171       * @param value
172       *    The locale.
173       *    If <jk>null</jk>, the default locale is used.
174       * @return This object.
175       */
176      public Builder locale(Locale value) {
177         this.locale = value == null ? Locale.getDefault() : value;
178         return this;
179      }
180
181      /**
182       * Specifies the locale.
183       *
184       * @param value
185       *    The locale.
186       *    If <jk>null</jk>, the default locale is used.
187       * @return This object.
188       */
189      public Builder locale(String value) {
190         return locale(value == null ? null : Locale.forLanguageTag(value));
191      }
192
193      /**
194       * Specifies a location of where to look for messages.
195       *
196       * @param baseClass The base class.
197       * @param bundlePath The bundle path.
198       * @return This object.
199       */
200      public Builder location(Class<?> baseClass, String bundlePath) {
201         this.locations.add(0, Tuple2.of(baseClass, bundlePath));
202         return this;
203      }
204
205      /**
206       * Specifies a location of where to look for messages.
207       *
208       * @param bundlePath The bundle path.
209       * @return This object.
210       */
211      public Builder location(String bundlePath) {
212         this.locations.add(0, Tuple2.of(forClass, bundlePath));
213         return this;
214      }
215
216      /**
217       * Specifies the bundle name (e.g. <js>"Messages"</js>).
218       *
219       * @param value
220       *    The bundle name.
221       *    <br>If <jk>null</jk>, the forClass class name is used.
222       * @return This object.
223       */
224      public Builder name(String value) {
225         this.name = isEmpty(value) ? cns(forClass) : value;
226         return this;
227      }
228
229      /**
230       * Adds a parent bundle.
231       *
232       * @param value The parent bundle.  Can be <jk>null</jk>.
233       * @return This object.
234       */
235      public Builder parent(Messages value) {
236         parent = value;
237         return this;
238      }
239
240      /**
241       * Builds the messages bundle.
242       *
243       * @return A new {@link Messages}, or <jk>null</jk> if no locations are configured.
244       */
245      @SuppressWarnings({
246         "unchecked", // Type erasure requires unchecked casts for message bundle access
247         "java:S3776", // Cognitive complexity acceptable for this specific logic
248      })
249      public Messages build() {
250
251         if (! locations.isEmpty()) {
252            Tuple2<Class<?>,String>[] mbl = locations.toArray(new Tuple2[0]);
253
254            Messages.Builder x = null;
255
256            for (var i = mbl.length - 1; i >= 0; i--) {
257               var c = firstNonNull(mbl[i].getA(), forClass);
258               var value = mbl[i].getB();
259               if (isProbablyJsonObject(value, true)) {
260                  MessagesString ms;
261                  try {
262                     ms = Json5.DEFAULT.to(value, MessagesString.class);
263                  } catch (ParseException e) {
264                     throw toRex(e);
265                  }
266                  x = Messages.create(c).name(ms.name).baseNames(StringUtils.splita(ms.baseNames, ',')).locale(ms.locale).parent(x == null ? null : x.build());
267               } else {
268                  x = Messages.create(c).name(value).parent(x == null ? null : x.build());
269               }
270            }
271
272            return x == null ? null : x.build();  // Shouldn't be null.
273         }
274
275         return new Messages(this);
276      }
277
278      ResourceBundle getBundle() {
279         var cl = forClass.getClassLoader();
280         var m = JsonMap.of("name", name, "package", forClass.getPackage().getName());
281         for (var bn : baseNames) {
282            bn = StringUtils.formatNamed(bn, m);
283            var rb = findBundle(bn, locale, cl);
284            if (nn(rb))
285               return rb;
286         }
287         return null;
288      }
289   }
290
291   /**
292    * Static creator.
293    *
294    * @param forClass
295    *    The class we're creating this object for.
296    * @return A new builder.
297    */
298   public static final Builder create(Class<?> forClass) {
299      return new Builder(forClass);
300   }
301
302   /**
303    * Constructor.
304    *
305    * @param forClass
306    *    The class we're creating this object for.
307    * @return A new message bundle belonging to the class.
308    */
309   public static final Messages of(Class<?> forClass) {
310      return create(forClass).build();
311   }
312
313   /**
314    * Constructor.
315    *
316    * @param forClass
317    *    The class we're creating this object for.
318    * @param name
319    *    The bundle name (e.g. <js>"Messages"</js>).
320    *    <br>If <jk>null</jk>, uses the class name.
321    * @return A new message bundle belonging to the class.
322    */
323   public static final Messages of(Class<?> forClass, String name) {
324      return create(forClass).name(name).build();
325   }
326
327   /**
328    * Composes two pre-built bundles into a single parent-chained bundle without mutating either input.
329    *
330    * <p>
331    * This is the public seam for parent-chain composition.  Use it when one {@link Messages} bundle is
332    * built locally and needs to inherit unresolved keys from a separately-built bundle &mdash; for
333    * example, a REST mixin sub-context inheriting its host's bundle.  The {@link Builder} chains inner
334    * locations via {@link Builder#parent(Messages)} during its own {@link Builder#build()} pass and
335    * does not expose this composition as a public API; {@code chain(...)} fills that gap without
336    * changing existing builder semantics.
337    *
338    * <p>
339    * The returned bundle is a NEW chain of {@link Messages} instances that share the inner
340    * {@link ResourceBundle}, {@code forClass}, and {@code locale} of {@code child}'s links.  Neither
341    * {@code child} nor {@code parent} is mutated.  Lookups follow {@code child}'s chain first and
342    * fall through to {@code parent} for any key not present in the child chain.
343    *
344    * @param child
345    *    The local bundle whose keys win first.
346    *    <br>If {@code null}, {@code parent} is returned unchanged.
347    * @param parent
348    *    The parent bundle whose keys are looked up when {@code child}'s chain doesn't resolve.
349    *    <br>If {@code null}, {@code child} is returned unchanged.
350    * @return The composed bundle, or {@code null} if both arguments are {@code null}.
351    */
352   public static Messages chain(Messages child, Messages parent) {
353      if (child == null)
354         return parent;
355      if (parent == null)
356         return child;
357      return spliceLeafParent(child, parent);
358   }
359
360   /*
361    * Returns a deep copy of the child chain in which the deepest link (the one with no parent)
362    * has its parent replaced by the new leaf parent.  Recurses without mutating any input.
363    */
364   private static Messages spliceLeafParent(Messages c, Messages newLeafParent) {
365      if (c.parent2 == null)
366         return new Messages(c.c, c.rb, c.locale, newLeafParent);
367      return new Messages(c.c, c.rb, c.locale, spliceLeafParent(c.parent2, newLeafParent));
368   }
369
370   private ResourceBundle rb;
371   private Class<?> c;
372   private Messages parent2;
373   private Locale locale;
374
375   // Cache of message bundles per locale.
376   private final ConcurrentHashMap<Locale,Messages> localizedMessages = new ConcurrentHashMap<>();
377
378   // Cache of virtual keys to actual keys.
379   private final Map<String,String> keyMap;
380
381   private final Set<String> rbKeys;
382
383   /**
384    * Constructor.
385    *
386    * @param builder
387    *    The builder for this object.
388    */
389   protected Messages(Builder builder) {
390      this(builder.forClass, builder.getBundle(), builder.locale, builder.parent);
391   }
392
393   Messages(Class<?> forClass, ResourceBundle rb, Locale locale, Messages parent) {
394      this.c = forClass;
395      this.rb = rb;
396      this.parent2 = parent;
397      if (nn(parent))
398         setParent(parent);
399      this.locale = locale == null ? Locale.getDefault() : locale;
400
401      var keyMap2 = new TreeMap<String,String>();
402
403      var cn = cns(c) + '.';
404      if (nn(rb)) {
405         rb.keySet().forEach(x -> {
406            keyMap2.put(x, x);
407            if (x.startsWith(cn)) {
408               var shortKey = x.substring(cn.length());
409               keyMap2.put(shortKey, x);
410            }
411         });
412      }
413      if (nn(parent2)) {
414         parent2.keySet().forEach(x -> {
415            keyMap2.put(x, x);
416            if (x.startsWith(cn)) {
417               var shortKey = x.substring(cn.length());
418               keyMap2.put(shortKey, x);
419            }
420         });
421      }
422
423      this.keyMap = u(copyOf(keyMap2));
424      this.rbKeys = rb == null ? Collections.emptySet() : rb.keySet();
425   }
426
427   @Override /* Overridden from ResourceBundle */
428   public boolean containsKey(String key) {
429      return keyMap.containsKey(key);
430   }
431
432   /**
433    * Looks for all the specified keys in the resource bundle and returns the first value that exists.
434    *
435    * @param keys The list of possible keys.
436    * @return The resolved value, or <jk>null</jk> if no value is found or the resource bundle is missing.
437    */
438   public String findFirstString(String...keys) {
439      for (var k : keys) {
440         if (containsKey(k))
441            return getString(k);
442      }
443      return null;
444   }
445
446   /**
447    * Returns this message bundle for the specified locale.
448    *
449    * @param locale The locale to get the messages for.
450    * @return A new {@link Messages} object.  Never <jk>null</jk>.
451    */
452   public Messages forLocale(Locale locale) {
453      if (locale == null)
454         locale = Locale.getDefault();
455      if (this.locale.equals(locale))
456         return this;
457      var mb = localizedMessages.get(locale);
458      if (mb == null) {
459         var parent = this.parent2 == null ? null : this.parent2.forLocale(locale);
460         var rb2 = this.rb == null ? null : findBundle(this.rb.getBaseBundleName(), locale, c.getClassLoader());
461         mb = new Messages(c, rb2, locale, parent);
462         localizedMessages.put(locale, mb);
463      }
464      return mb;
465   }
466
467   @Override /* Overridden from ResourceBundle */
468   public Enumeration<String> getKeys() { return Collections.enumeration(keySet()); }
469
470   /**
471    * Similar to {@link ResourceBundle#getString(String)} except allows you to pass in {@link MessageFormat} objects.
472    *
473    * @param key The resource bundle key.
474    * @param args Optional {@link MessageFormat}-style arguments.
475    * @return
476    *    The resolved value.  Never <jk>null</jk>.
477    *    <js>"{!key}"</js> if the key is missing.
478    */
479   public String getString(String key, Object...args) {
480      var s = getString(key);
481      if (s.startsWith("{!"))
482         return s;
483      return f(s, args);
484   }
485
486   @Override /* Overridden from ResourceBundle */
487   public Set<String> keySet() {
488      return keyMap.keySet();
489   }
490
491   /**
492    * Returns all keys in this resource bundle with the specified prefix.
493    *
494    * <p>
495    * Keys are returned in alphabetical order.
496    *
497    * @param prefix The prefix.
498    * @return The set of all keys in the resource bundle with the prefix.
499    */
500   public Set<String> keySet(String prefix) {
501      Set<String> set = set();
502      keySet().forEach(x -> {
503         if (x.equals(prefix) || (x.startsWith(prefix) && x.charAt(prefix.length()) == '.'))
504            set.add(x);
505      });
506      return set;
507   }
508
509   protected FluentMap<String,Object> properties() {
510      // @formatter:off
511      var m = filteredBeanPropertyMap();
512      keySet().forEach(x -> m.a(x, getString(x)));
513      return m;
514      // @formatter:on
515   }
516
517   @Override /* Overridden from Object */
518   public String toString() {
519      return r(properties());
520   }
521
522   @Override /* Overridden from ResourceBundle */
523   protected Object handleGetObject(String key) {
524      var k = keyMap.get(key);
525      if (k == null)
526         return "{!" + key + "}";
527      try {
528         if (rbKeys.contains(k))
529            return rb.getObject(k);
530      } catch (@SuppressWarnings("unused") MissingResourceException e) { /* Shouldn't happen */ }
531      return parent2.handleGetObject(key);
532   }
533}
